title: SEC approves Nasdaq to list Bitcoin index options on the exchange
summary: The cash-settled, European-style contracts will trade under the ticker QBTC on Phlx, but still require CFTC approval before trading can begin.

title: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark ‘contrarian’ buy signal: Santiment
summary: Ongoing Bitcoin ETF outflows have historically “correlated with conditions favorable for patient accumulation rather than panic," according to Santiment.

title: Ebola Outruns Containment in Eastern Congo as Contact Tracing Falters
summary: Ebola is spreading faster than responders can track it in eastern Congo, where health workers managed to follow up with barely one in five identified contacts in a single day.

title: Rubio to Meet India’s Modi With Energy, Trade Ties in Focus
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio is set to meet with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, with energy security high on the agenda as the South Asian nation grapples with soaring oil prices and supply disruptions stemming from the war in Iran.

title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
